Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed out of all activity executions in the event log
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all cases

Name: Number of times Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs before SW-Reviewer Agreed
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Reviewer Agreed' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed is directly followed by SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-Checklist Completed'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases that eventually lead to SW-EIC Accept
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-EIC Accept'

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurrences that are preceded by Manuscript Export Succeeded
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Manuscript Export Succeeded'

Name: Number of variants containing Plagiarism Originality Report Completed that result in a major revision outcome (e.g., SW-EIC Major Revision)
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-EIC Major Revision' occurs

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed executions that occur within the first 24 hours after Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: the average of the function base < 24 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Plagiarism Percent Match Threshold Exceeded'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases that include at least one reviewer invitation reminder (e.g., Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1 or 2)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Reviewer Invitation Reminder 1'

Name: Percentage of cases where Plagiarism Originality Report Completed appears exactly once versus multiple times
Metric: the average of the function base == 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'

Name: Number of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed events that are followed by any checklist-related activity (e.g., SW-Checklist Completed, SW-Checklist Completion is due in three days)
Metric: Number of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' activities for cases where activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' occurs

Name: Percentage of variants starting with SW-Awaiting Checklist Completion in which Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurs before any reviewer assignment activity (e.g., SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'SW-AE Assign Reviewers'

Name: Frequency of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed in cases that ultimately reach First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'First Look Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Ratio of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed to Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation across the entire log
Metric: Percentage of 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed' out of all 'Original Manuscript Submission Confirmation'

Name: Percentage of Plagiarism Originality Report Completed occurrences that are part of variants with performance duration above the median variant duration
Metric: ERROR: computing metric {'count': activity == 'Plagiarism Originality Report Completed'", 'metric_condition': '> median', 'aggregation': 'percentage'}"
